data.title: Secure Sockets Layer (SSL)
data.description: SSL ensures data encrypted between the server and the client.

data.title: Content Security Policy (CSP)
data.description: Prevents cross-site scripting attacks using CSP headers.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: Protects the site from common exploits by filtering traffic.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts routine security checks to ensure vulnerabilities are patched.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security for user accounts through 2FA.
